summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Hub Marketplace and ServerDashboard features. All 12 backend marketplace tests passed (100%). Frontend flows working correctly - Marketplace tab with search/filter, Install buttons, ServerDashboard with sidebar/credentials/tools/API keys tabs, route priority for /dashboard/chatwoot.
passed_tests: GET /api/marketplace/catalog returns 12 curated servers with categories
GET /api/marketplace/catalog?category=developer filters by category (returns GitHub, GitLab)
GET /api/marketplace/catalog?search=github filters by search term
GET /api/marketplace/catalog with combined category+search filters
GET /api/marketplace/catalog returns categories list (developer, database, utility, etc.)
POST /api/marketplace/publish requires authentication (401)
POST /api/marketplace/publish returns 404 for non-existent server
POST /api/marketplace/publish requires server_name parameter (400)
POST /api/marketplace/publish -> verify in catalog -> unpublish flow works
POST /api/marketplace/publish returns 409 for already published server
DELETE /api/marketplace/{slug} requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/marketplace/{slug} returns 404 for non-existent entry
Marketplace catalog marks installed servers with installed=true
Frontend: DashboardHub has 'Installed' and 'Marketplace' tabs
Frontend: Marketplace tab shows grid of 12 server cards
Frontend: Marketplace search filters cards (github -> 1 result)
Frontend: Marketplace category filter works (developer -> 2 results)
Frontend: Install buttons visible on marketplace cards
Frontend: Install button triggers /api/servers/add and refreshes list
Frontend: After install, card shows 'Installed' badge
Frontend: Dynamic server 'Share to Marketplace' button visible
Frontend: /dashboard/{serverName} route loads ServerDashboard
Frontend: ServerDashboard shows sidebar with server info, status badge
Frontend: ServerDashboard shows Start/Stop/Restart buttons
Frontend: ServerDashboard Credentials section with Configure button
Frontend: ServerDashboard nav tabs (Tools, API Keys)
Frontend: ServerDashboard tools tab shows 'Server is not running' when stopped
Frontend: ServerDashboard API Keys tab renders ApiKeyManager
Frontend: Clicking dynamic server card navigates to /dashboard/{serverName}
Frontend: /dashboard/chatwoot loads ChatwootDashboard (not ServerDashboard)
Frontend: Route priority correct - specific route before :serverName param
seed_data_creation: Test servers (memory, github, test-marketplace-publish) created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketplace and ServerDashboard fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/marketplace/catalog (public, returns curated+community servers with installed flag), POST /api/marketplace/publish (admin, publishes installed server to community), DELETE /api/marketplace/{slug} (admin, removes from marketplace). Frontend: DashboardHub.js has Installed/Marketplace tabs. Marketplace.js shows grid with search/filter/install. ServerDashboard.js is the dynamic server detail page with sidebar (status, credentials, server info) and main content (tools list, API keys). Route priority: /dashboard/chatwoot matches ChatwootDashboard before :serverName matches ServerDashboard. CURATED_SERVERS list in server.py has 12 popular MCP servers (GitHub, GitLab, Slack, PostgreSQL, Brave Search, Filesystem, Memory, Fetch, Puppeteer, Google Drive, Sentry, SQLite).
